w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: A web system where students can browse clubs and events, register for events, and admins can manage clubs, events, and view participation statistics.
I want to authenticate using my email and password,
So that I can securely access features appropriate to my role.
I get a login successful message
I’m redirected to my dashboard page
I put in invalid email/password details
get a wrong email/password combo error message
I remain on the login page
I want to authenticate using my email and password,
So that I can securely access features appropriate to my role.
I attempt to access admin-only endpoints
I don’t get access to the requested resource
I get access to my requested resource
I want to create, update, and deactivate student clubs,
So that the list of available clubs remains accurate and relevant.
I’m on the create club page
I’ve filled in valid club data
it is visible for all users
I’m on the create club page
put in a club name that already exists
I get an error message “Club already exists”
it is visible for all users
I’m on the update club page
to the “Are you sure you want to d
the club is hidden from all users
I want to create and manage events associated with clubs,
So that clubs can organise and advertise activities.
I’m on the manage club page
the event is linked to that club
I’m on the manage club page
an invalid capacity or past date
invalid capacity/ date error message is displayed
I’m on the manage club page
event is linked to that club
I’m on the manage club page
an invalid capacity or past date
an invalid capacity/ date error message is displayed
I want to browse clubs and upcoming events with search and sorting,
So that I can easily find activities I am interested in.
I’m on the browse Clubs and Events page
by name or filter by category
I’m on the browse Clubs and Events page
I want to register for events,
So that my participation is recorded and capacity limits are respected.
I’m on the event registration page for an event
the capacity for the event is not reached
I get a registration successful message
I’m on the event registration page for an event
I’m already registered for the event
“You’re already registered for this event page”
I’m on the event registration page for an event
the capacity for the event is reached
I get a message “Capacity for this event is reached”
I want to cancel my event registration,
So that I can manage my commitments.
I am registered for an event
the registration is removed from the system
I get a cancellation successful message
I want to view participation statistics,
So that I can assess club engagement and event popularity.
I’m logged in as an administrator
I’m logged in as an administrator
a clear “No data available” message is shown.
